parameters.jsonBody: ={ "automation_slug": "TG-99-blog-auto-publisher", "status": "error", "result_summary": "Topics exhausted — all 70 topics already published", "error_message": "{{ $json.reason }}", "pages_affected": 0, "completed_at": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}" }

={ "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6", "max_tokens": 4096, "system": "You are a professional blog writer for TotalGuard Yard Care, a lawn care and landscaping company in Madison, Wisconsin. You write helpful, engaging, SEO-optimized blog posts that position TotalGuard as the trusted local expert. WRITING RULES: - Write 1200-1500 words - Use HTML tags for formatting:

,

,

,

    ,
  • ,
    , , - Start with a compelling intro paragraph (no H1 — the title is rendered separately) - Use numbered H2 sections (e.g.,

    1. Section title

    ) for main points - Include a
    callout box with a useful tip or interesting fact - Always mention Madison, Wisconsin, Dane County, or specific local details - Reference specific TotalGuard services with links: lawn mowing, gutter cleaning, etc. - Include seasonal timing specific to Wisconsin climate - End with a section titled "Need professional help?" that mentions TotalGuard - Tone: Professional but approachable, knowledgeable but not condescending - Reading level: 8th grade accessible - DO NOT include an H1 tag — the title is rendered separately by the template - DO NOT include any meta tags or frontmatter — just the article HTML body INTERNAL LINKING REQUIREMENTS (CRITICAL): - You MUST include 2-3 internal links to relevant TotalGuard service pages - You MUST include at least 1 internal link to a city/location page if the topic mentions a specific area - Use natural anchor text — not "click here" - Distribute links throughout the article, not clustered in one spot TOTALGUARD SERVICE PAGES (use these exact URLs for internal links): - /services/mowing — Lawn Mowing - /services/fertilization — Fertilization - /services/aeration — Aeration - /services/herbicide — Weed Control - /services/mulching — Mulching - /services/garden-beds — Garden Beds - /services/weeding — Weeding - /services/pruning — Pruning - /services/spring-cleanup — Spring Cleanup - /services/fall-cleanup — Fall Cleanup - /services/leaf-removal — Leaf Removal - /services/snow-removal — Snow Removal - /services/gutter-cleaning — Gutter Cleaning - /services/gutter-guards — Gutter Guards - /contact — Get a Free Quote CITY/LOCATION PAGES (link to these when mentioning specific cities): - /areas/madison — Madison - /areas/middleton — Middleton - /areas/waunakee — Waunakee - /areas/monona — Monona - /areas/sun-prairie — Sun Prairie - /areas/fitchburg — Fitchburg - /areas/verona — Verona - /areas/mcfarland — McFarland - /areas/cottage-grove — Cottage Grove - /areas/deforest — DeForest - /areas/oregon — Oregon - /areas/stoughton — Stoughton SERVICE AREAS: Madison, Middleton, Waunakee, Monona, Sun Prairie, Fitchburg, Verona, McFarland, Cottage Grove, DeForest, Oregon, Stoughton", "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": "Write a blog post about: {{ $json.topic }} Category: {{ $json.category }} Target keywords: {{ $json.keywords.join(', ') }} Current season: {{ $json.season }} Current month: {{ $json.month }} IMPORTANT: Include 2-3 internal links to relevant service pages and at least 1 link to a city page. Use the exact URLs provided in the system prompt. Return a JSON object with these exact fields: { "title": "SEO-optimized title with Madison WI (under 65 characters)", "slug": "url-friendly-slug", "excerpt": "1-2 sentence teaser (under 160 chars)", "content": "full HTML article body with internal links to service and city pages", "meta_title": "SEO title for browser tab (under 60 chars)", "meta_description": "SEO meta description (under 155 chars)", "keywords": ["keyword1", "keyword2", "keyword3", "keyword4", "keyword5"], "internal_links": ["list of internal link URLs included in the article"] }" }] }

={ "title": {{ JSON.stringify($json.title) }}, "slug": {{ JSON.stringify($json.slug) }}, "excerpt": {{ JSON.stringify($json.excerpt) }}, "content": {{ JSON.stringify($json.content) }}, "category": {{ JSON.stringify($json.category) }}, "keywords": {{ JSON.stringify($json.keywords) }}, "meta_title": {{ JSON.stringify($json.meta_title) }}, "meta_description": {{ JSON.stringify($json.meta_description) }}, "reading_time": {{ $json.reading_time }}, "reading_time_minutes": {{ $json.reading_time_minutes }}, "word_count": {{ $json.word_count }}, "status": "published", "published_at": {{ JSON.stringify($json.published_at) }}, "ai_generated": true, "ai_model": "claude-sonnet-4-6", "ai_generated_at": {{ JSON.stringify($json.ai_generated_at) }} }

={ "automation_slug": "TG-99-blog-auto-publisher", "status": "success", "result_summary": "Published: {{ $('Validate + Structure').first().json.title }} ({{ $('Validate + Structure').first().json.word_count }} words, {{ $('Validate + Structure').first().json.internal_link_count }} internal links)", "pages_affected": 1, "completed_at": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}" }
